name: tier-b/dotnet/02-multiple-sln-files
description: Two .sln files at root (AppA.sln, AppB.sln); spec mandates lex-first selection (AppA.sln). Fixture asserts package_roots_count=1 from AppA's single Project entry; AppB.sln is ignored. Spec's 'warning about alternates' has no schema representation (no warning evidence_type, no declared notes_code in shipped doc) — notes_codes remains empty.

manifests.AppA.sln:
Microsoft Visual Studio Solution File, Format Version 12.00
Project("{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}") = "AppA", "src/AppA/AppA.csproj", "{AAAAAAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAAAAAAAAAA}"
EndProject
manifests.AppB.sln:
Microsoft Visual Studio Solution File, Format Version 12.00
Project("{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}") = "AppB", "src/AppB/AppB.csproj", "{BBBBBBBB-BBBB-BBBB-BBBB-BBBBBBBBBBBB}"
EndProject
